Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Horacio Uribe.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:16 a.m.

Matthew W. Keim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Pamela Ritter, Assistant Vice President and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Ritter and Mr. Keim appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Horacio Uribe.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts {Open Book Account and Account Stated} was filed on March 8, 2022.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Horacio Uribe occurred on July 2, 2021, and was effectuated on July 12, 2021.
Default as to defendant Horacio Uribe was entered on December 17, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Copies of Defendant's Monthly Account Statements...........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Horacio Uribe, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,753.22.
Costs - $517.00.

Total - $25,270.22.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:27 a.m.
